title: The Expedition of Dhat al -Salasil
description: According to Ibn I;Iumayd-Salamah-Muhammad b. Ishaq'Abdallah b. Abi Bakr, who said: The Messenger of God sent 'Amr b. al-'Aq to the territory of Bali and 'Udhrah to seek their assistance [for an expedition] to Syria. The circumstances were as follows. The mother of al-'A§ b. Will was a woman from [the tribe of ] Bali. The Messenger of God therefore sent 'Amr b. al-'Ag to [ 16os J them to try to gain their good will.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 08
